reviews.review_description:
This isn't ready for end users yet, but it's a great taste for enthusiasts.     Games weren't playable for me yet (version 0.2.0),   but the   turning 2d games into 3d games works amazingly well.    It was even able to turn my   windows desktop background into 3d, which is just... magic.

This is still too way too early if you're looking for something that just works, but  if you want to support something that is clearly going to magically make games 3d into actual 3d with your VR glasses, then it's a great time to jump in.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! We’re very happy to hear that you enjoyed the app.

CYBIONYX InMotion is currently in Early Access, and we’ll continue improving and refining it to make the experience as smooth and convenient as possible for our users. Your feedback is incredibly valuable and helps us understand what we should work on next!
